_comment: BOOTSTRAP PLACEHOLDER — not a real signature. Until a maintainer signs, `node scripts/manifest.mjs verify` will fail loudly and CI will block PRs. To produce a real signature: (1) `node scripts/keygen.mjs --id <your-id>`, (2) paste the printed row into catalog/MAINTAINERS.md, (3) `node scripts/manifest.mjs build` if catalog changed, (4) `node scripts/manifest.mjs sign --key ~/.config/statuslines/maintainer-<your-id>.json`. The signing key never leaves your machine. CI does not need it; CI only verifies.
